pre-01.reason: Return type unchanged — existing { content: string; attachments?: RoledAttachments } | null covers all new cases

pre-02.reason: nostling always writes lowercase; third-party bare plaintext is not JSON so case-sensitivity is a non-issue

pre-03.reason: Empty-string guard at function entry returns null before any JSON.parse attempt; consistent with spec §3.1

pre-04.reason: Storage layer has idb-keyval set for per-row rewrite; no separate putMessage needed (self-heal story-04)

pre-06.reason: decryptDirectPayload wraps nip04.decrypt in try/catch, logs 'dm:decrypt-empty' on failure, returns null — no exception propagates

pre-07.reason: New test cases go in existing app/tests/unit/directMessages.test.ts as direct parseDirectPayload calls after vi.mock blocks

e2e.reason: E2E suite not run as part of this story-01 implementation pass

ac_coverage.AC-07: implemented (via lenient parser — ingestEvent returns ChatMessage for non-empty bare plaintext)
ac_coverage.AC-08: implemented (via lenient parser — handleGiftWrapEvent upserts for non-empty decrypted content)
ac_coverage.AC-12: implemented (E2E spec written; full relay → bell → chat pipeline)
ac_coverage.AC-31: implemented (spy on console.warn/console.error asserts zero calls)

changes_summary.parseDirectPayload: Rewritten with 4-tier priority: empty guard → text envelope → image envelope → unknown JSON/non-JSON fallback. Falls through to { content: raw } for all non-empty strings.
changes_summary.decryptDirectPayload: Wrapped nip04.decrypt in try/catch; logs 'dm:decrypt-empty' on decrypt failure or empty decrypted string; returns null in both cases.
changes_summary.shouldIngestRumor: Logs 'dm:rumor-rejected' at info level when returning false (rumor.pubkey mismatch).
changes_summary.unwrapAndOpen: Logs 'dm:unwrap-failed' at info level before re-throwing the generic error.
changes_summary.unit_tests: 6 new test cases in directMessages.test.ts covering AC-01–AC-04, AC-05, AC-31. All 786 tests pass.
changes_summary.e2e_test: app/tests/e2e/dm-third-party-inbound.spec.ts written covering AC-12 (full relay round-trip). Not run as part of this pass.

Found and fixed missing `afterEach` import in directMessages.test.ts — the test suite failed immediately on first run because `afterEach` was not imported from vitest. Also confirmed `shouldIngestRumor` test in dualListen.test.ts already exercises the new info-level log path, validating the logging integration without any test changes needed.
